text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch sight of Yaeno Muteki and some of her
friends as I'm walking through the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...So you see, I just want everyone to behave as
cheerfully as always.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Well, that sounds fine to me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You just want us to chat right next to you? Erm...
are you sure that isn't going to bother you,
Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I welcome the chatter. Removing
distractions and clearing my mind helps
strengthen my ability to concentrate.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello, Trainer. I asked Chiyono O and Creek
to help me with my meditation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm working on focusing my mind without letting
myself get distracted by the sounds around me.
Would you care to join us?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um, uh, okay... Just gotta be normal... It's
actually hard to be normal when you're on the
spot!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It is, isn't it? What kind of things do we usually
talk about? Hmm... What if we talked about the
curry I made the other day?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! That curry was sooo good! Somehow, eating it put me at ease!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're sure it wasn't too sweet? I used a
mild roux, but I added some honey as well.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! In fact, maybe that explains why it was
so soothing! I hadn't eaten mild curry in so long
that it was like having a serving of nostalgia!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What an incredibly peaceful discussion. That
curry sounds really good too—wait, I'm supposed
to be meditating. I've got to focus harder!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...You know? I think Tama might just be going
through a bit of a touchy spell at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Seriously?! ...I think my little sister might've
gone through a phase like that too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'd like to meet your little sister
someday! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me! I bought this really good
juice from the school store earlier. I hear little
kids really like it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like before, I can't help but take an interest
in the conversation going on beside me. I turn to
see how Yaeno Muteki is getting on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't batted an eye. Talk about being a
concentration pro... But just as I'm about to
follow her example and straighten my posture—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki moves with lightning speed the
very instant we hear the yelp.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...It's okay. Nothing spilled.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you so much! That was incredible... Did
you catch it in midair?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry! My hand just slipped a little... I
must've disturbed your training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's no problem. The Kongo Yaegaki style is a
discipline centered around protection. This is how
it is meant to be used.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
More than anything, I'm glad that nobody's
clothes got wet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though Yaeno Muteki was concentrating
intensely, she darted to her friend's aid the
moment she heard a shriek.
choice_data_list:
That was amazing! Talk about springing into
action!

I bet it's the kindness in your heart that made
that possible.

I bet it's the kindness in your heart that made
that possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though Yaeno Muteki was concentrating
intensely, she darted to her friend's aid the
moment she heard a shriek.
choice_data_list:
That was amazing! Talk about springing into
action!

I bet it's the kindness in your heart that made
that possible.

I bet it's the kindness in your heart that made
that possible.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, but I think my Kongo Yaegaki training
certainly played a part.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, your teachings have played a
significant role when it comes to my explosive
speed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Please look forward to seeing me put it to use in
my next race!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Until then, please keep the tough training
coming! Osu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is full of enthusiasm for her next
race, so I'm going to channel that passion into her
training!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: K-kindness?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not that I'm kind. I'm merely adhering to
the teachings of the Kongo Yaegaki style.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A strong carrot is both tender and sweet! You're definitely kind!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! You're always helping everyone, just like
a gallant knight! You're so kind, coming to the
rescue! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm... not so sure about that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But thank you all the same for your kind words.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki has a fundamental desire to
protect others, and today, I got to witness it in
action!
